data.title: Use Service Objects for Payment Flows
data.claim: Use Service Objects for payment orchestration.
data.body:
## Background
The team agreed that payment orchestration should stay out of controllers.

## Details
Service Objects coordinate retries and external calls.
data.considerations: Re-evaluate if payment orchestration becomes event-driven.

data.title: Do Not Call APIs in Callbacks
data.claim: MUST-NOT call external APIs from ActiveRecord callbacks.
data.body:
## Background
A retry storm started from callback-driven API calls.

## Details
Use explicit service boundaries for external IO.

## Rejected Alternatives
Retrying inside callbacks kept failing silently.
data.alternative: Use a service object or background job outside the callback lifecycle.
data.considerations: None identified from current evidence. Re-evaluate if callbacks become async-safe.
